swahili.answer_your_first_challenge_correctly: Jibu changamoto yako ya kwanza kwa usahihi
swahili.estimate_the_value_the_arrow_points_to: Kadiria thamani ambayo mshale unaonyesha (hadi nambari kamili iliyo karibu zaidi).
swahili.click_the_number_line_above_to_place_a: Bofya mstari wa nambari hapo juu kuweka alama.
swahili.number_line_marker_use_arrow_keys_to_m: Alama ya mstari wa nambari. Tumia vitufe vya mshale kusogeza, Home/End kwa ncha, Shift kwa hatua kubwa zaidi.
swahili.number_line_fractions_above_decimals_b: 📏 Mstari wa nambari — sehemu juu, desimali chini
swahili.same_amount_three_more_visuals_quantit: 🔄 Kiasi kilekile, taswira tatu zaidi. Kiasi huhifadhiwa katika kila uwakilishi.
swahili.move_the_marker_by_a_fraction_fraction: ➕➖ Sogeza alama kwa sehemu — hesabu ya sehemu kwenye mstari
swahili.click_a_chip_below_the_marker_slides_a: Bofya chip hapa chini. Alama huteleza; taswira zote nne husasishwa. Mstari hujirefusha kiotomatiki ukivuka ukingo.
swahili.common_denominator_hunter_how_to_add_f: 🤝 Mwindaji wa Kiwango cha Pamoja — jinsi ya kujumlisha sehemu zenye viwango tofauti
swahili.you_cannot_add_1_2_1_3_directly_first_: Huwezi kujumlisha 1/2 + 1/3 moja kwa moja. Kwanza tafuta kiwango cha pamoja (KKK kinafanya kazi), andika upya kila sehemu, kisha jumlisha vionja.
swahili.equivalent_fractions_same_point_many_n: ∞ Sehemu sawia — nukta moja, majina mengi. Bofya kugawa upya mstari.
swahili.multiply_or_divide_the_top_and_bottom_: Zidisha (au gawanya) kionja NA kiwango kwa nambari ileile → thamani ileile, jina tofauti. Alama haisongi.
swahili.a_quarter_is_0_25_1_4_of_a_dollar_a_di: Robo ni $0.25 = 1/4 ya dola. Dime ni $0.10 = 1/10. Sarafu ni mazoezi ya desimali.
swahili.every_decimal_place_is_a_fraction_1st_: Kila nafasi ya desimali ni sehemu. Nafasi ya 1: kumi, ya 2: mia, ya 3: elfu.
swahili.reset_frac_dec_tab_to_defaults: Weka upya kichupo cha Sehemu Desimali kwa chaguo-msingi
swahili.why_fractions_and_decimals_are_the_sam: 💡 Kwa nini sehemu na desimali ni kitu kimoja
swahili.3_4_means_3_divided_by_4_type_3_4_into: 3/4 inamaanisha «3 kugawanywa na 4». Andika 3 ÷ 4 katika kikokotoo chochote: 0.75. Mstari wa sehemu na ÷ vinamaanisha kitu kimoja.
swahili.a_decimal_is_a_fraction_with_a_hidden_: Desimali NI sehemu yenye kiwango kilichofichwa.
swahili.0_6_means_6_tenths_6_10_0_25_means_25_: 0.6 inamaanisha «6 kumi», 6/10. 0.25 inamaanisha «25 mia», 25/100, ambayo hurahisishwa kuwa 1/4.
swahili.the_point_at_1_4_is_the_same_point_as_: Nukta ya 1/4 ni nukta ileile ya 0.25. Mahali pamoja, majina mawili.
swahili.1_2_0_5_stops_1_4_0_25_stops_1_3_0_333: 1/2 = 0.5 (hukoma). 1/4 = 0.25 (hukoma). 1/3 = 0.333… (hujirudia milele). Kiwango huamua: ikiwa kinagawanyika kwa 2 na 5 tu, hukoma. Vinginevyo hujirudia. Tazama alama ↻ kwenye kadi ya desimali.
swahili.ai_number_line_tutor: 🤖 Mwalimu wa AI wa Mstari wa Nambari
swahili.toggle_number_line_option: Geuza chaguo la mstari wa nambari
swahili.explore_the_visual_home_for_number_sen: Chunguza — nyumba ya kuona kwa hisia ya nambari
swahili.numbers_as_positions_on_a_line_not_jus: Nambari kama nafasi kwenye mstari, si alama tu. Hasi huakisi kuzunguka sufuri. Sehemu hukaa KATI ya nambari kamili; desimali ni wazo lilelile kwa undani zaidi. Common Core 2.MD.6, 3.NF.2, 6.NS.6.
swahili.where_does_7_8_sit_what_about_2_4_esti: 7/8 inakaa wapi? Vipi kuhusu −2.4? Kukadiria hujenga hisia ya ukubwa. Utafiti (Siegler 2009) unaonyesha usahihi kwenye mstari wa nambari hutabiri mafanikio ya hisabati ya baadaye vizuri zaidi kuliko ukweli uliokaririwa.
swahili.skip_count_the_bridge_to_multiplicatio: Kuhesabu kwa Kuruka — daraja kuelekea kuzidisha
swahili.2_4_6_8_the_2_times_table_walking_skip: 2, 4, 6, 8… = jedwali la kuzidisha la 2 likitembea. Kuhesabu kwa 5 na 10 huandaa kwa pesa na wakati. Kuhesabu nyuma kwa 3 huandaa kwa kutoa na kugawanya. Mstari unaonyesha mdundo.
swahili.fractions_decimals_same_point_two_name: Sehemu ↔ Desimali, nukta moja, majina mawili
swahili.a_fraction_is_a_division_problem_a_dec: Sehemu ni tatizo la mgawanyo. Desimali ni sehemu yenye kiwango kilichofichwa 10, 100, 1000… 1/4 na 0.25 ni mahali PAMOJA kwenye mstari. Common Core 4.NF.6, 4.NF.7, 5.NBT.3.
swahili.two_fractions_four_possible_relationsh: Sehemu mbili, mahusiano manne yanayowezekana: sawa, zikigusa alama ya ½, A ndogo au B ndogo. Sogeza vitelezi, andika unachogundua, na andika kanuni yako ya kulinganisha.
swahili.adjust_the_numerators_and_denominators: Rekebisha vionja na viwango vya sehemu mbili. Wijeti hukuambia mojawapo ya mahusiano manne tofauti. Hakuna alama, hakuna ufunuo — sogeza tu na gundua.
swahili.hypothesis_free_text_when_do_two_fract: Dhana (maandishi huru): Sehemu mbili huwa sawa lini? Moja huwa karibu na ½ lini?
swahili.find_two_fractions_with_different_nume: Tafuta sehemu mbili zenye vionja na viwango tofauti zilizo sawa.
swahili.what_makes_a_fraction_close_to_what_ab: Ni nini hufanya sehemu kuwa karibu na ½? Vipi karibu na 1?
swahili.when_are_two_fractions_easy_to_compare: Sehemu mbili ni rahisi kulinganisha lini? Ni ngumu lini?
swahili.explain_how_to_compare_two_fractions_w: Eleza jinsi ya kulinganisha sehemu mbili bila kubadilisha kuwa desimali.
swahili.design_note_discrete_4_state_outcome_n: Dokezo la muundo: matokeo tofauti ya hali 4; hakuna alama ya kulinganisha sehemu; hakuna ufunuo — kwa makusudi.
swahili.1_4_tabs_n_new_challenge_ai_tutor_on_m: ⌨️ 1-4: vichupo | N: changamoto mpya | ?: mwalimu wa AI | ← → kwenye alama: sogeza | Home/End: ncha
swahili.integers_absolute_value_distance_from_: 🔢 Nambari kamili — Thamani kamili = umbali kutoka sufuri
swahili.absolute_value_number_line_showing_dis: Mstari wa nambari wa thamani kamili unaoonyesha umbali kutoka sufuri

somali.answer_your_first_challenge_correctly: Si sax ah uga jawaab caqabaddaada koowaad
somali.solve_3_negative_number_challenges: Xalli 3 caqabadood oo tiro taban ah
somali.estimate_the_value_the_arrow_points_to: Qiyaas qiimaha falaartu tilmaamayso (ilaa tirada buuxda ee ugu dhow).
somali.click_the_number_line_above_to_place_a: Guji khadka tirada ee kor ku yaal si aad u dhigto calaamad.
somali.number_line_marker_use_arrow_keys_to_m: Calaamadda khadka tirada. Isticmaal furayaasha falaaraha si aad u dhaqaajiso, Home/End darafyada, Shift tallaabooyin waaweyn.
somali.number_line_fractions_above_decimals_b: 📏 Khadka tirada — jajabka kor, jajab-toban hoos
somali.same_amount_three_more_visuals_quantit: 🔄 Qadar isku mid ah, saddex muuqaal oo kale. Qadarka waa lagu ilaaliyaa matalaad kasta.
somali.move_the_marker_by_a_fraction_fraction: ➕➖ Dhaqaaji calaamadda jajab — xisaabta jajabka khadka
somali.click_a_chip_below_the_marker_slides_a: Guji chip hoose. Calaamadda way siibataa; afarta muuqaal oo dhan way cusboonaadaan. Khadku si toos ah ayuu u dheeraadaa haddii aad ka gudubto cidhifka.
somali.common_denominator_hunter_how_to_add_f: 🤝 Ugaarsadaha Hoosta Wadareedka — sida loo isku daro jajab hoos kala duwan leh
somali.you_cannot_add_1_2_1_3_directly_first_: Si toos ah uma isku dari kartid 1/2 + 1/3. Marka hore raadi hoos wadareed (KWK way shaqeysaa), dib u qor jajab kasta, kadibna isku dar tirooyinka korka.
somali.equivalent_fractions_same_point_many_n: ∞ Jajab u dhigma — barta isku mid ah, magacyo badan. Guji si aad dib ugu qaybiso khadka.
somali.multiply_or_divide_the_top_and_bottom_: Ku dhufo (ama u qaybi) tirada korka IYO hoosta tiro isku mid ah → qiime isku mid ah, magac kale. Calaamaddu ma dhaqaaqdo.
somali.quick_conversions_click_to_plot: 📌 Beddelaad degdeg ah (guji si aad u sawirto):
somali.a_quarter_is_0_25_1_4_of_a_dollar_a_di: Rubuc waa $0.25 = 1/4 doolar. Dime waa $0.10 = 1/10. Lacagaha qadaadiicda waa tababar jajab-toban.
somali.every_decimal_place_is_a_fraction_1st_: Goob kasta oo jajab-toban waa jajab. Goobta 1aad: tobanaad, 2aad: boqolaad, 3aad: kunaad.
somali.reset_frac_dec_tab_to_defaults: Dib u dhig tabka Jajab Jajab-toban ilaa caadiga
somali.why_fractions_and_decimals_are_the_sam: 💡 Sababta jajabka iyo jajab-tobanku ay isku mid u yihiin
somali.3_4_means_3_divided_by_4_type_3_4_into: 3/4 macnaheedu waa «3 loo qaybiyey 4». Qor 3 ÷ 4 xisaabiye kasta: 0.75. Xariiqda jajabka iyo ÷ macno isku mid ah ayay leeyihiin.
somali.a_decimal_is_a_fraction_with_a_hidden_: Jajab-tobanku WAA jajab leh hoos qarsoon.
somali.0_6_means_6_tenths_6_10_0_25_means_25_: 0.6 macnaheedu waa «6 tobanaad», 6/10. 0.25 macnaheedu waa «25 boqolaad», 25/100, kaas oo u fududaada 1/4.
somali.the_point_at_1_4_is_the_same_point_as_: Barta 1/4 waa barta isku mid ah ee 0.25. Goob isku mid ah, laba magac.
somali.some_terminate_some_repeat: Qaar way dhammaadaan, qaar way isku celcelinayaan.
somali.1_2_0_5_stops_1_4_0_25_stops_1_3_0_333: 1/2 = 0.5 (way joogsadaa). 1/4 = 0.25 (way joogsadaa). 1/3 = 0.333… (weligeed isku celcelinaysa). Hoostu way go'aamisaa: haddii ay u kala baxdo 2 iyo 5 oo keliya, way dhammaataa. Haddii kale way isku celcelinaysaa. Fiiri calaamadda ↻ kaarka jajab-tobanka.
somali.explore_the_visual_home_for_number_sen: Sahan — guriga muuqaalka ee dareenka tirada
somali.numbers_as_positions_on_a_line_not_jus: Tirooyinka oo ah meelo khad ku yaal, ee aan ahayn calaamado kaliya. Tirooyinka tabanku waxay ka muuqdaan eber agteeda. Jajabku wuxuu ku jiraa DHEXDA tirooyinka buuxda; jajab-tobanku waa fikrad isku mid ah oo ka sii xeel dheer. Common Core 2.MD.6, 3.NF.2, 6.NS.6.
somali.where_does_7_8_sit_what_about_2_4_esti: 7/8 halkee bay fadhidaa? −2.4 na? Qiyaasidu waxay dhistaa dareenka cabbirka. Cilmi-baaris (Siegler 2009) waxay muujinaysaa in saxnaanta khadka tiradu ay si fiican u saadaaliso guusha xisaabeed ee mustaqbalka marka loo eego xaqiiqooyinka la xafiday.
somali.skip_count_the_bridge_to_multiplicatio: Tirinta Boodboodka — buundada loo gudbo isku dhufashada
somali.2_4_6_8_the_2_times_table_walking_skip: 2, 4, 6, 8… = jadwalka isku dhufashada 2 oo socda. Tirinta 5 iyo 10 waxay u diyaarisaa lacagta iyo wakhtiga. Tirinta dib u noqoshada 3 waxay u diyaarisaa ka jarista iyo qaybinta. Khadku wuxuu muujiyaa cod-laxanka.
somali.fractions_decimals_same_point_two_name: Jajab ↔ Jajab-toban, barta isku mid ah, laba magac
somali.a_fraction_is_a_division_problem_a_dec: Jajabku waa dhibaato qaybin. Jajab-tobanku waa jajab leh hoos qarsoon 10, 100, 1000… 1/4 iyo 0.25 waa goob ISKU MID AH khadka. Common Core 4.NF.6, 4.NF.7, 5.NBT.3.
somali.two_fractions_four_possible_relationsh: Laba jajab, afar xiriir oo suurtagal ah: siman, taabanaya calaamadda ½, A ka yar ama B ka yar. Jiid sliders-ka, qor waxa aad ogaato, oo qor xeerkaaga isbarbardhigga.
somali.adjust_the_numerators_and_denominators: Hagaaji tirooyinka korka iyo hoosta laba jajab. Wijigu wuxuu kuu sheegaa mid ka mid ah afar xiriir oo gooni ah. Dhibco ma jiraan, daahfur ma jiro — kaliya jiid oo ogow.
somali.hypothesis_free_text_when_do_two_fract: Mala-awaal (qoraal xor ah): Goorma ayay laba jajab siman yihiin? Goorma ayuu mid ku dhowaadaa ½?
somali.find_two_fractions_with_different_nume: Hel laba jajab oo leh tiro kor iyo hoos kala duwan oo siman.
somali.what_makes_a_fraction_close_to_what_ab: Maxaa jajab uga dhigaya mid ku dhow ½? 1 na?
somali.when_are_two_fractions_easy_to_compare: Goorma ayay laba jajab fududahay in la isbarbardhigo? Goorma ay adagtahay?
somali.explain_how_to_compare_two_fractions_w: Sharax sida loo isbarbardhigo laba jajab adoo aan u beddelin jajab-toban.
somali.design_note_discrete_4_state_outcome_n: Qoraal naqshadeed: natiijo gooni ah oo 4-xaaladood; dhibco isbarbardhig jajab ma jiraan; daahfur ma jiro — si ula kac ah.
somali.1_4_tabs_n_new_challenge_ai_tutor_on_m: ⌨️ 1-4: tababar | N: caqabad cusub | ?: macallinka AI | ← → calaamadda: dhaqaaji | Home/End: daraf
somali.integers_absolute_value_distance_from_: 🔢 Tirooyinka buuxda — Qiimaha dhabta ah = masaafada eber
somali.absolute_value_number_line_showing_dis: Khadka tirada qiimaha dhabta ah ee muujinaya masaafada eber

hausa.quarter_hundred: Kashi ɗaya cikin huɗu na ɗari
hausa.solve_3_negative_number_challenges: Warware ƙalubale 3 na lamba mara kyau
hausa.what_number_does_the_arrow_point_to: Kibiya tana nuni zuwa wace lamba?
hausa.estimate_the_value_the_arrow_points_to: Kiyasta darajar da kibiya ke nunawa (zuwa lamba cikakkiya mafi kusa).
hausa.two_thirds_repeats_forever: Biyu bisa uku (yana maimaitawa har abada)
hausa.click_the_number_line_above_to_place_a: Danna layin lamba na sama don sanya alama.
hausa.number_line_marker_use_arrow_keys_to_m: Alamar layin lamba. Yi amfani da maɓallan kibiya don motsi, Home/End don gefuna, Shift don manyan matakai.
hausa.number_line_fractions_above_decimals_b: 📏 Layin lamba — ɓangarori sama, ƙimar goma ƙasa
hausa.same_amount_three_more_visuals_quantit: 🔄 Adadi iri ɗaya, ƙarin hotuna uku. Ana adana adadin a kowane wakilci.
hausa.this_decimal_repeats_forever: Wannan ƙimar goma tana maimaitawa har abada
hausa.move_the_marker_by_a_fraction_fraction: ➕➖ Motsa alama da ɓangare — lissafin ɓangare a layin
hausa.click_a_chip_below_the_marker_slides_a: Danna chip a ƙasa. Alama tana zamewa; hotuna huɗu duka suna sabuntawa. Layin yana tsawaitawa kai tsaye idan ka wuce gefe.
hausa.common_denominator_hunter_how_to_add_f: 🤝 Mai Farautar Mai-Raba Ɗaya — yadda ake haɗa ɓangarori masu raba daban
hausa.you_cannot_add_1_2_1_3_directly_first_: Ba za ka iya haɗa 1/2 + 1/3 kai tsaye ba. Da farko nemo mai-raba ɗaya (LCM yana aiki), sake rubuta kowane ɓangare, sannan ka haɗa masu-ƙidaya.
hausa.equivalent_fractions_same_point_many_n: ∞ Ɓangarori daidai — wuri ɗaya, sunaye da yawa. Danna don sake raba layin.
hausa.multiply_or_divide_the_top_and_bottom_: Ninka (ko raba) mai-ƙidaya DA mai-raba da lamba iri ɗaya → daraja iri ɗaya, suna daban. Alama ba ta motsi.
hausa.a_quarter_is_0_25_1_4_of_a_dollar_a_di: Kwata shine $0.25 = 1/4 na dala. Dime shine $0.10 = 1/10. Tsabar kuɗi atisaye ne na ƙimar goma.
hausa.every_decimal_place_is_a_fraction_1st_: Kowane wurin ƙimar goma ɓangare ne. Wuri na 1: goma, na 2: ɗari, na 3: dubu.
hausa.reset_frac_dec_tab_to_defaults: Sake saita shafin Ɓangare Ƙimar-goma zuwa tsoho
hausa.why_fractions_and_decimals_are_the_sam: 💡 Me ya sa ɓangarori da ƙimar goma suke abu ɗaya
hausa.3_4_means_3_divided_by_4_type_3_4_into: 3/4 yana nufin «3 a raba 4». Rubuta 3 ÷ 4 a kowace na'urar lissafi: 0.75. Layin ɓangare da ÷ suna nufin abu ɗaya.
hausa.a_decimal_is_a_fraction_with_a_hidden_: Ƙimar goma ɓangare ne mai mai-raba ɓoyayye.
hausa.0_6_means_6_tenths_6_10_0_25_means_25_: 0.6 yana nufin «6 goma», 6/10. 0.25 yana nufin «25 ɗari», 25/100, wanda ke saukaka zuwa 1/4.
hausa.the_number_line_proves_it: Layin lamba yana tabbatar da hakan.
hausa.the_point_at_1_4_is_the_same_point_as_: Wurin 1/4 shine wuri iri ɗaya da 0.25. Wuri ɗaya, sunaye biyu.
hausa.some_terminate_some_repeat: Wasu suna ƙarewa, wasu suna maimaitawa.
hausa.1_2_0_5_stops_1_4_0_25_stops_1_3_0_333: 1/2 = 0.5 (yana tsayawa). 1/4 = 0.25 (yana tsayawa). 1/3 = 0.333… (yana maimaitawa har abada). Mai-raba yana yanke shawara: idan yana rarrabuwa zuwa 2 da 5 kawai, yana ƙarewa. In ba haka ba yana maimaitawa. Kalli alamar ↻ akan katin ƙimar goma.
hausa.explore_the_visual_home_for_number_sen: Bincika — gidan gani na fahimtar lamba
hausa.numbers_as_positions_on_a_line_not_jus: Lambobi a matsayin wurare a layin, ba kawai alamomi ba. Marasa kyau suna nunawa kewaye da sifili. Ɓangarori suna TSAKANIN lambobi cikakku; ƙimar goma ra'ayi iri ɗaya ne mai zurfi. Common Core 2.MD.6, 3.NF.2, 6.NS.6.
hausa.where_does_7_8_sit_what_about_2_4_esti: Ina 7/8 yake zama? −2.4 fa? Kiyasta yana gina fahimtar girma. Bincike (Siegler 2009) yana nuna cewa daidaiton layin lamba yana hasashen nasarar lissafi ta gaba fiye da gaskiyar da aka haddace.
hausa.2_4_6_8_the_2_times_table_walking_skip: 2, 4, 6, 8… = teburin ninka 2 yana tafiya. Ƙidaya da 5 da 10 yana shirya don kuɗi da lokaci. Ƙidaya baya da 3 yana shirya don ragi da rabo. Layin yana nuna kari.
hausa.fractions_decimals_same_point_two_name: Ɓangare ↔ Ƙimar-goma, wuri ɗaya, sunaye biyu
hausa.a_fraction_is_a_division_problem_a_dec: Ɓangare matsalar rabo ne. Ƙimar goma ɓangare ne mai mai-raba ɓoyayye 10, 100, 1000… 1/4 da 0.25 wuri ɗaya ne a layin. Common Core 4.NF.6, 4.NF.7, 5.NBT.3.
hausa.two_fractions_four_possible_relationsh: Ɓangarori biyu, alaƙa huɗu masu yiwuwa: daidai, suna taɓa alamar ½, A ƙarami ko B ƙarami. Ja sliders, rubuta abin da ka lura, kuma rubuta ƙa'idarka ta kwatanta.
hausa.adjust_the_numerators_and_denominators: Daidaita masu-ƙidaya da masu-raba na ɓangarori biyu. Widget yana gaya maka ɗaya daga cikin alaƙa huɗu daban. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa — kawai ja kuma lura.
hausa.hypothesis_free_text_when_do_two_fract: Hasashe (rubutu kyauta): Yaushe ɓangarori biyu suke daidai? Yaushe ɗaya ke kusa da ½?
hausa.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ka makale — nuna tambayoyi a buɗe
hausa.find_two_fractions_with_different_nume: Nemo ɓangarori biyu masu masu-ƙidaya da masu-raba daban da suke daidai.
hausa.what_makes_a_fraction_close_to_what_ab: Me ke sa ɓangare ya kusa da ½? Kusa da 1 fa?
hausa.when_are_two_fractions_easy_to_compare: Yaushe ɓangarori biyu suke da sauƙin kwatanta? Yaushe suke da wahala?
hausa.explain_how_to_compare_two_fractions_w: Bayyana yadda ake kwatanta ɓangarori biyu ba tare da mai da su ƙimar goma ba.
hausa.design_note_discrete_4_state_outcome_n: Bayanin ƙira: sakamako daban na yanayi 4; babu makin kwatanta ɓangare; babu bayyanawa — da gangan.
hausa.1_4_tabs_n_new_challenge_ai_tutor_on_m: ⌨️ 1-4: shafuka | N: sabon ƙalubale | ?: malamin AI | ← → akan alama: matsa | Home/End: gefuna
hausa.integers_absolute_value_distance_from_: 🔢 Lambobi cikakku — Cikakkiyar daraja = nisa daga sifili
hausa.absolute_value_number_line_showing_dis: Layin lamba na cikakkiyar daraja mai nuna nisa daga sifili
